Title: Orbital
Author: Samantha Harvey
My Review: Meandering mediations on the insignificance of life as mere mortals interwoven with natural disaster and human moments of love and death. Beautifully written at times but sometimes repetitive and ultimately neutral in opinion. I found that I was craving for something deeper. Harvey seems to skim along the surface of philosophy, much like her fictional astronauts and cosmonauts.
